violations.text: Establishment's Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license is expired. FMC must re-instate. Application emailed during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025
Molluscan Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information. The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag were lacking. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025

The cutting boards on the line are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the glass washer and dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025
The wall and wall cap near hand sink are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2025
